text:
742 Maple Ave, Rochester, NY 14607 — single-family ranch, 1958 build, ~1,420 sqft.

LISTING: Active on Zillow at $185,000 (DOM 18). Redfin shows same list price. Realtor.com confirms.

TAXES: Monroe County annual property tax $5,920 (~3.2% effective on list).

RENT: Listing notes long-term tenant at $1,650/month gross; no multifamily.

INSURANCE: Local zip average ~$1,500/year (~$125/month).

COMPS:
- 710 Maple Ave sold $192,000 (similar size, 2024)
- 801 Culver Rd sold $188,500 (2024)
- 655 East Ave sold $179,000 (slightly smaller, 2023)

VACANCY / MGMT: Rochester 14607 typical vacancy ~6%; management 8–10%.

Sources:
https://www.zillow.com/homedetails/742-maple-ave-rochester-ny/
https://www.redfin.com/ny/rochester/742-maple-ave-14607/
https://www.realtor.com/realestateandhomes-detail/742-Maple-Ave_Rochester_NY_14607
